AJF_H45_M9R_Eu5_v4.2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: TCM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "0069",
    "version": "0011"
  }
]

        "bitoffset": 4

      }
